transcript: Customer: Hi, this is James Miller. I'm calling because my heat pump is blowing cold air instead of heat. Dispatcher: Hi James, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Rheem, an older one, 15 years. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 1500 Sunset Blvd. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out tomorrow between 8 and 10 AM. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.issue: heat pump is blowing cold air instead of heat
expected_entities.equipment: Rheem heat pump, an older one, 15 years
